overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character exploring an ancient Greek temple at dusk. The character exits onto a terrace overlooking a valley, summons an eagle companion, and then walks back through the torch-lit temple courtyard.

events.description: character exits the enclosed temple interior onto the open terrace

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone corridor toward the terrace exit

entered.detail: reddish stone walls of the temple interior
large stone archway leading outside to the terrace
tall stone columns with red painted bases visible through the doorway
tall stone columns with red painted bases visible through the doorway
tall dark cypress trees visible beyond the terrace

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow stone corridor inside the temple, moving toward a large archway that opens onto an exterior terrace. The interior walls are smooth reddish stone, and through the doorway, tall columns and cypress trees become visible as the character approaches the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple terrace with panoramic valley view

events.description: character stops walking at the terrace edge to observe the valley view

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace between cypress trees and stopping to overlook the illuminated valley below

entered.detail: low stone wall at the edge of the terrace overlooking the valley
distant ancient city with scattered torch lights in the valley below
bright moon visible in the dark blue evening sky
tall dark cypress trees lining the left side of the terrace
tall dark cypress trees lining the right side of the terrace

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide marble terrace flanked by tall cypress trees, with the night sky and crescent moon visible above. Walking between the stone columns, the character approaches the terrace edge and stops to observe the panoramic view of the illuminated valley city spread out below.

events.description: eagle Ikaros swoops down and lands on the character's raised arm

agents.ego_description: standing still while summoning and holding the eagle companion Ikaros

notable_agents.action: eagle landing on the character's arm and perching there

entered.detail: large bird of prey with dark feathers and white markings landing on the character's arm
decorated shield on the character's back with red and gold emblem

segments.scene_description: Standing on the terrace with the moon visible in the dark blue sky, the character raises an arm to summon the eagle Ikaros, which swoops down and lands on the character's forearm. The character holds the eagle briefly while turning away from the valley view, with the decorated shield visible on their back.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with statues and burning braziers

events.description: character turns away from the terrace and walks back into the temple courtyard
character approaches the main temple gate with statues on the roof

agents.ego_description: walking through the torch-lit temple courtyard toward the main entrance gate

notable_agents.action: distant robed figure standing near the temple gate

entered.detail: large stone columns with red painted bases supporting the temple structure
large stone columns with red painted bases supporting the temple structure
flaming torches in metal holders illuminating the courtyard
flaming torches in metal holders illuminating the courtyard
stone statues of figures standing on top of the temple gate structure
large decorative metal gate with geometric lattice patterns

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the terrace back into the temple complex, passing between large stone columns and burning braziers that cast warm orange light. The character approaches the main temple gate, which features decorative statues on its roof and an iron lattice gate, while a distant figure stands near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed stone depths of a temple out onto a moonlit terrace before returning to a torch-lit courtyard. It begins within a narrow corridor of smooth reddish stone, moving steadily toward a large archway that reveals glimpses of cypress trees and columns. As the character emerges onto the wide marble terrace, the scene opens up to a dark blue night sky and a crescent moon, eventually pausing at the edge to overlook a panoramic view of an illuminated valley city. The camera then lingers as the character summons an eagle that swoops down to land on their forearm, before turning away from the vista with a decorated shield visible on their back. Finally, the movement shifts back into the temple complex, passing through the warm orange glow of burning braziers and stone columns toward a main gate adorned with statues and an iron lattice.
